title: Everything You Need to Know About Crypto Payment Gateways for Digital Products — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, trying to sell ebooks, courses, or templates without getting blocked by PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad, this is for you. You're not alone in the struggle to get paid for your work due to geographic restrictions or banking limitations. But what if you could sell your digital products without relying on these platforms, and get paid instantly in your preferred cryptocurrency? Let's break it down.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

A crypto payment gateway for digital products is a tool that enables creators to sell their digital goods without relying on traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. This means no more getting blocked due to geographic restrictions or banking limitations, and no more worrying about fees or account requirements. With a crypto payment gateway, you can sell your ebooks, courses, templates, and other digital products directly to your customers, and get paid instantly in your preferred cryptocurrency.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind a crypto payment gateway is built on blockchain and cryptocurrency infrastructure. When a customer buys your digital product, they send cryptocurrency directly to your wallet using a unique QR code generated by Web3 Wallet Connect. The transaction is then verified and settled instantly, and you receive the payment in your preferred cryptocurrency. This process eliminates the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe, and allows you to get paid directly to your wallet.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is built for digital creators who want to sell their products without relying on traditional payment processors. Whether you're an ebook author, course creator, or template designer, you can use a crypto payment gateway to sell your digital goods directly to your customers. This is especially important for creators in countries with restricted access to traditional payment processors, or those who want to avoid fees and account requirements.
A crypto payment gateway is a game-changer for digital creators who want to get paid directly in their preferred cryptocurrency.
The Components That Make It Work Together

A crypto payment gateway typically consists of three main components: a frontend wallet integration, a payment processor, and a backend engine. The frontend wallet integration, such as Web3 Wallet Connect, allows customers to send cryptocurrency directly to your wallet using a unique QR code. The payment processor, such as NOWPayments, handles the transaction and settlement process. And the backend engine, such as the Core Shop Engine, manages the payment processing and automated delivery of your digital products.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know how a crypto payment gateway works, it's time to take action. First, sign up for a crypto payment gateway like Unchained Commerce, which offers a range of tools and services to help you get started. Next, integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website or online store to generate unique QR codes for your customers. Finally, set up your payment processor and backend engine to manage the payment processing and automated delivery of your digital products.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Can I sell ebooks and courses without relying on PayPal or Stripe? Yes, you can use a crypto payment gateway like Unchained Commerce, which offers a range of tools and services to help you get paid directly in your preferred cryptocurrency. This means no more getting blocked due to geographic restrictions or banking limitations, and no more worrying about fees or account requirements.
With a crypto payment gateway, you can sell your digital products without relying on traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a way to sell digital downloads without relying on traditional payment processors, you may also be interested in exploring other options like digital download stores that only accept crypto payments. For example, you can use the Web3 Wallet Connect to generate unique QR codes for your customers to pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

Prepare your product files in delivery-ready format — PDF for ebooks, ZIP archives for multi-file products like font families or preset packs. Set your prices in USD and use NOWPayments to handle the crypto equivalent calculation automatically. Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure your product list with file paths, prices, and delivery settings. Set up Web3 Wallet Connect with your product display and checkout configuration. Test the checkout flow in a browser on both desktop and mobile — confirm the QR code generates correctly and the payment amount displays accurately. Complete a real mainnet test transaction and confirm the delivery email arrives with a working download link. Open the Admin Dashboard and verify the test transaction appears with correct details. Once the test passes, publish your store URL across your content channels. Review your first week of transactions in the Admin Dashboard to confirm everything is running correctly.
Get paid instantly in your preferred cryptocurrency, and avoid fees and account requirements with a crypto payment gateway.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
